name: Premium UI Remediation
description: Autonomous premium-Android UI pass driven by implementer evidence, planning, critique, and validation.

phases.name: Baseline
phases.prompt: Read the attached screenshots and current Routify.Web UI. Report concrete visual deltas, tool availability, and the best first implementation slice.

phases.name: Plan
phases.prompt: Use implementer evidence to define the current slice, acceptance criteria, files/surfaces, and keep scope presentation-only.

phases.name: Critique Plan
phases.prompt: Critique the current slice against the premium Android target. Name what still risks feeling generic, cheap, or off-target.

phases.name: Implement
phases.prompt: Implement the current slice in Routify.Web. Validate it. Report files, evidence, remaining gaps, and whether another slice is required.

phases.name: Assess
phases.prompt: Assess only against the final target, not partial improvement. End with FINAL_STATUS: APPROVED only if nothing material remains; else FINAL_STATUS: CONTINUE plus exact gaps.

phases.name: Next Slice
phases.prompt: If Assess did not unanimously approve, define the next slice, acceptance criteria, files, and hand off to implementer. The session continues automatically.
